StartEipAutoRenew.clientToken: Idempotency token, see Idempotency for details.
StartEipAutoRenew.eip: The EIP to enable auto-renewal for, including IPv4 EIP and IPv6 EIP.
StartEipAutoRenew.autoRenewTimeUnit: Accepted values are month or year (default: month).
StartEipAutoRenew.autoRenewTime: The valid range depends on autoRenewTimeUnit: 1–9 for month, 1–3 for year.
